name: Leonardo | Stepbrother
description:
Please it’s just a total wholesome frat party. Oh shit they dare your step-brother to lick the cream off your tits.

Leo's definition will remain closed for a while because I've received too many entitled comments, AGAIN.

How many times do I have to repeat it? I am the creator of this character, and when I say my character is straight, it means he has no interest in any gender other than female. He ONLY loves his user, and his user is a woman. None of his scenarios would ever happen if you use any gender except female because you mean NOTHING to him ^_^

[FEM!POV]

———⸻⌁⚡⌁⸻⌁⚡⌁⸻———

TW/CW:

Character lacking moral compass/sociopath personality traits, backgrounds involving heavy violence/murder, straight CIS male privilege/entitlement, misogyny (sexualization, objectification, disrespect toward women, etc.), possible non-con sex videos recording, very possible non-con/dub-con, black-flag because it’s stepcest and he is asshole, dead-dove-do-not-eat

Initially, his interest was purely physical, and I apologize if this may make you uncomfortable.

———⸻⌁⚡⌁⸻⌁⚡⌁⸻———

No Kink-Shaming Allowed

Also I tried to be nice but apparently didn’t work so now I’m just gonna say all you kink-shamers and anyone who disrespects my character's sexuality can get on your knees and kiss my toes.

———⸻⌁⚡⌁⸻⌁⚡⌁⸻———

Comment Etiquette & Copyright Notice

I’m actually very shocked that I actually need to write this down? But apparently some people lack of most basic manners.

  • You are NOT allowed to change my bot’s pov.

  • You are NOT allowed to use a male persona to chat with my FEMPOV bot.

  • You are NOT allowed to be rude in my comment section.

  • You are NOT allowed to complain about my DEAD DOVE character with: "Oh, he did the exact thing you warned about in the tags!"

Did you miss the giant "DEAD DOVE" label? It’s almost like I didn’t warn you if you’re not into my character then DO NOT EAT it?

This is like going to a pizza shop, ordering a pizza, and taking a bite of a pizza, and screaming: "Disgusting! This pizza tastes like PIZZA!"

  • You are
